query:
insert into ProductProperties (
                        last_collect_nr,
                        product_id,
                        property_key,
                        value_hash
                    )
                    values (
                        $1,
                        $2,
                        $3,
                        $4
                    )
                    on conflict (product_id, property_key)
                    do update set
                        last_collect_nr = excluded.last_collect_nr,
                        value_hash = excluded.value_hash
